upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na tatte agne pra mfze nivartanaM yad dUre sannihABavaH' (f0 392)
'vihitaM mayA'dya sadasIdamapamfzitamacyutArcanam' (SiSu॰15.46) ityatra apamfzitamasoQamityarTa iti malliH upasargavaSAd viparItArTateti ca saH
'sarvataH samupetasya tava (daSagrIvasya) tenABimarzaRam' (rA0 61118) aBimarzaRaM prasahanaM parABavaH
'mA no agne sararUpA pitryARi pra marzizWA aBi viduzkaviH san' (f0 17110)
'yatra suparRAH… animizanto vedanenABisvarantIti vA'BiprayantIti vA' (ni0 3121) aBiprayanti=ABimuKyena prayAnti
'syAtsvalpaH saNkaraH saparihAraH sapratyavamarzaH kuSalasya nApakarzAyAlam' (sAM0 ta0 kO0 udDftaM paYcaSiKasUtram) pratyavamarzo'kAmena sahanam
'sEnDavaM yena rAjAnaM paryAmfzitavAnaTa' (BA0 vi0 523) kaRWe jagrAha jitavAnityarjunamiSraH pUrvo'rTastu mfSereva Gawata iti mohamuktavAMzwIkAkAraH
